name: Kolace Fillings
recipeInstructions:
1. Nut Filling: Beat the egg whites until frothy with a fork. Add the beaten egg whites, sugar, and melted butter to the ground walnuts. Mix well. Makes approximately 10 dozen.
2. Apricot Filling #1: Wash the apricots. Combine them with water and cook until soft for about 1/2 hour, stirring constantly to prevent scorching. Stir in sugar and cornstarch, then cook for one minute. Cool. Use a teaspoonful of filling for each square. Makes 8 dozen.
3. Apricot Filling #2: Mix all ingredients and refrigerate until ready to use.
4. Poppyseed Filling: Mix together the filling ingredients. Set aside until the milk is absorbed and the mixture is cooled.
